personal.name: Dimitrios Stergiou
personal.title: CISO
personal.bio: CISO with 25+ years delivering zero-breach security programs across fintech and payments. Proven track record: SOC 2, PCI DSS, ISO 27001, DORA compliance achieved on time with zero audit observations. I build security programs that survive audits and enable business growth.

achievements: Achieved SOC 2, PCI DSS, ISO 27001, and DORA compliance — all on time, zero audit observations
Built corporate IT function from scratch for 300+ employees and 600+ contractors globally
Designed and implemented enterprise-wide information security strategy and risk management framework
Secured cloud-native AWS infrastructure and integrated DevSecOps into engineering workflow
Conduct annual incident response, business continuity, and disaster recovery tests with documented improvement tracking
scope: Define and execute information security strategy and program
Manage Corporate IT department providing remote support across all global locations
Develop and operate information security risk management framework
Develop and operate security incident response framework
Implement DevSecOps and secure SDLC
Develop and maintain business continuity and disaster recovery plans
Ensure compliance with information security and privacy regulations (DORA, GDPR, PCI DSS, SOC 2, ISO 27001)
Manage third-party vendor relationships for IT and security services

Built and embedded information security policy framework from the ground up
Managed team of 4 external security consultants alongside internal stakeholders
